title: Pentagon: Project Freedom involves 15,000 troops, 'temporary' and 'defensive' — will hand off to allies
snippet: Project Freedom involves roughly 15,000 US service members. Commanders have ability to detect, track and neutralize threats in real time across air and sea domains. Hegseth: operation 'defensive in nature, focused in scope, and temporary in duration' with one mission: protecting innocent commercial shipping. Will subsequently be taken over by other countries. 10 civilian sailors have died due to ongoing conflict in Hormuz. US Navy destroyed 7 Iranian fast boats.
tag_reason: Project Freedom의 규모(15,000명), 민간 사망자(10명), 동맹 이관 계획은 이전 보도에 없던 신규 상세 정보
